texto: Sneaky and underhanded, the Federal Reserve has been sucking the life blood out of the United States since 1913. Like a black widow spider, it weaves a web of corruption and deceit. Unknown to its prey, the FED's bite is poisonous, deep, long-lasting and brings financial upheaval and misery to Americans.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jim McCarthy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Sneaky and underhanded, the Federal Reserve has been sucking the life blood out of the United Sta…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, federal-reserve, the-money-spiders pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-money-spiders e united-states.
